title: wedelia heringeriana
intro: Wedelia heringeriana, also known as Mexican daisy or Flor de Calendula, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Wedelia heringeriana include the ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Wedelia heringeriana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
